research_labs.short_description: The Lab of Anastasios (Tasos) Tsaousis at the University of Kent investigates the cell biology and evolution of microbial eukaryotes, with a focus on the human gut parasite Blastocystis.

research_labs.short_description: Eleni Gentekaki's Lab at Mae Fah Luang University leads research on the diversity, evolution, and epidemiology of Blastocystis.
